raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX my Citi-Bank credit card was fraudulently charged {$480.00} by XXXX XXXX XXXX I did not authorize this charge. I beieve this to be a double billing for the XXXX XXXX XXXX I purchased on XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX in 4 montly installments on XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, my final payment was charged and I received an email from XXXX saying my subscription was paid in full for the year. It is impossible to speak to a person at XXXX. They do not respond to phone calls, you are rerouted, or email. Chatbot is ineffective. I filed a dispute with Citi-Bank and forwarded all the information they requested. They want more of which there is no more. I have given them all the facts. I have talked to XXXX XXXX and a supervisor named XXXX. They will not give their last names. XXXX said it would be resolved no later than XXXX. I never heard back form Citi-Bank . By law they are supposed to give me a reason in writing what the charge was for, but they have not done so. I have included documents showing confirmation, charges and receipts.
